must_detect.matched_text:
Dara AgroTech Public Company Limited (a company listed on the SET) — Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum under the PDPA (Thailand).
Registered office: 88 Soi Phra Pinit, Klong Toei, Bangkok; Juristic Tax ID: 0-1234-56789-01-5 (Thai), Company Reg. No.: 0105559999888 (fictional).
Data Protection Officer: Khun Suda Namsai, privacy@daraagrotech.example, tel: +66 2 990 7788; Public Helpline: 0000-111-222 (generic, not tied to any individual).
We process personal data for employment (HR files, payroll), financing and SEC Thailand/SET disclosure obligations, vendor due diligence, and investor relations; MNPI may arise but is ring-fenced.
Direct identifiers processed may include Thai national ID (for employees), TH passport numbers, phone/email, payroll bank accounts, and office access logs; we avoid collecting unnecessary data.
Example record: Employee TH Passport No.: JZ1234567; Mobile: +66 83 456 7890; Email: somchai.nim@daraagrotech.example; Office address: 12/F, Rama IX Tower, Huai Khwang, Bangkok (fictional).
Corporate A c c o u n t: 9 9 8 - 7 - 1 2 3 4 5 - 0 at Kinnaree Bank PCL (fictional); Supplier VAT No.: 3-2100-00999-77-4 (checksum invalid by design).
The following bait-like items are not used to identify you: Name: ______; Role: CFO; "helpdesk 1234"; not a MAC address: aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff — ignore for PDPA purposes.
Cross-border transfers: to Dara AgroTech (Lao) Co., Ltd. and Makara Data Pte. Ltd. (SG) for cloud hosting on NokCloud SG-1 under PDPC-approved SCCs; url: https://privacy.daraagrotech.example/transfers?ref=TH-XB-20 2 6.
For SEA/SEC compliance, we may disclose to the SEC Thailand and SET in filings (e.g., One Report) but will redact personal data not required by law; MNPI (ข้อมูลภายใน) is handled per insider information controls.
MNPI withheld from DSAR results includes undisclosed debenture pricing terms and non-public quarterly forecasts that could materially affect our securities price.
